sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36961" key="e(ca/shmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑξάσημος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n36961.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of six times,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">συζυγία</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:14:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.1</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ῥυθμοί</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> </bibl> </cit> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
